title: cyperus dactyliformis var. elatior
intro: Cyperus dactyliformis var. elatior is a variety of sedge plant, scientifically known as a type of grass-like perennial that belongs to the Cyperaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus dactyliformis var. elatior include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, it is often used as a decoction or infusion, typically made by boiling or steeping the roots and rhizomes of the plant in water.
